hooks.command:
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "gh pr create" && echo "⛔ STOP — Finishing-task checklist (CLAUDE.md):
  1. docs/roadmap.md  — mark ticket done, update Status section
  2. docs/architecture.md — new tables / routers / middleware / patterns?
  3. docs/feature-patterns.md — new pattern or template emerged?
  4. CLAUDE.md — new hard constraint or convention?
Only run gh pr create after completing the applicable steps above." || true'
